articles.title: SOL price surging after Solana ChatGPT plugin unveiled
articles.description: Solana users will soon be able to interact with the network through a ChatGPT plugin. Users can use the plugin to check wallet balances, transfer Solana-native tokens, and buy NFTs. Developers are also encouraged to test using the plugin to retrieve on-chain data. At press time, SOL price was up 7.33% 34 hours after Solana […]

articles.title: Lens Protocol rolls out Bonsai, a blockchain scaling solution for social media
articles.description: The creators of Lens Protocol have introduced a beta version of Bonsai, a blockchain scaling solution for decentralized social media.

articles.title: Circle Unveils New Method for Moving USDC Between Blockchains
articles.description: The cross-chain transfer protocol seeks to improve liquidity of the major crypto payments rail.

articles.title: Circle activates protocol for stablecoin transfers between Ethereum and Avalanche
articles.description: The Cross-Chain Transfer Protocol allows USDC transfers between Ethereum and Avalance.

articles.title: Avalanche core team implements Cortina upgrade on mainnet
articles.description: Cortina upgraded to latest version of Avalanche Go v1.10.0, bringing changes to help optimize the network for developers.
